#Linux Start Isolation - nftables
#Isolates Linux hosts that are running nftables.
#RHEL/CentOS 6+
#Rocky/Alma 8+
#Debian 10+
#Ubuntu 18+

import os

os.system("nft list ruleset > /root/nftables_currentstate")
os.system("nft flush ruleset")
os.system("nft add table ip filter")
os.system("nft 'add chain ip filter INPUT { type filter hook input priority 0; policy drop; }'")
os.system("nft 'add chain ip filter FORWARD { type filter hook forward priority 0; policy accept; }'")
os.system("nft 'add chain ip filter OUTPUT { type filter hook output priority 0; policy drop; }'")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter INPUT iifname lo counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter INPUT udp sport 67-68 udp dport 67-68 counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter INPUT udp sport 53 ct state established counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter INPUT ip protocol tcp ip saddr 172.64.148.55 counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter INPUT ip protocol tcp ip saddr {104.18.39.201,192.35.177.23,54.188.131.5,54.188.114.190,54.71.197.112,192.111.7.0/24,192.111.4.0/24,52.20.233.31,34.224.236.198,34.198.112.150,34.194.224.132,34.199.238.4,34.199.250.32,52.22.120.193,34.225.208.192,52.206.206.244,54.234.131.176,54.161.128.60,174.129.203.65,128.177.8.0/24,107.21.218.60,107.21.217.202,107.21.212.157,107.20.234.220,107.20.229.191,107.20.203.8,107.20.158.55,54.227.247.102,54.225.228.244,54.225.228.166,54.225.228.145,54.225.227.105,54.225.227.45,54.225.227.30,54.225.227.9,54.225.226.117,54.221.255.190,54.221.210.7,54.204.8.61,54.88.208.235,54.83.45.221,52.70.63.25,52.70.61.193,52.70.61.181,52.70.61.174,52.70.60.74,52.70.59.121,52.70.59.59,52.70.58.10,52.70.56.136,52.70.47.45,52.70.35.37,52.70.13.27,52.70.11.137,52.23.140.222,52.23.134.105,52.23.107.89,52.23.87.4,52.23.73.146,52.23.16.199,52.23.13.34,52.22.156.183,52.22.64.192,52.21.134.210,52.21.117.50,52.21.52.149,52.20.141.147,52.20.123.238,52.20.14.163,52.6.197.200,52.6.103.57,52.5.92.125,52.4.246.178,52.4.245.162,52.4.151.41,52.4.98.101,52.3.190.47,52.3.178.163,52.3.149.24,52.2.128.246,52.2.63.194,52.0.55.209,50.16.250.236,50.16.244.193,50.16.242.171,23.23.224.83,23.23.198.191,23.23.197.169,52.11.13.222,35.160.108.105,34.223.219.240,54.188.131.5,54.188.114.190,54.71.197.112,54.200.152.114,52.43.91.219,52.88.16.211,54.200.174.54,54.68.234.245,54.71.115.87} counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter OUTPUT oifname lo counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter OUTPUT udp dport 53 ct state new,established counter accept")
os.system("nft add rule ip filter OUTPUT ip protocol tcp ip daddr {104.18.39.201,192.35.177.23,54.188.131.5,54.188.114.190,54.71.197.112,192.111.7.0/24,192.111.4.0/24,52.20.233.31,34.224.236.198,34.198.112.150,34.194.224.132,34.199.238.4,34.199.250.32,52.22.120.193,34.225.208.192,52.206.206.244,54.234.131.176,54.161.128.60,174.129.203.65,128.177.8.0/24,107.21.218.60,107.21.217.202,107.21.212.157,107.20.234.220,107.20.229.191,107.20.203.8,107.20.158.55,54.227.247.102,54.225.228.244,54.225.228.166,54.225.228.145,54.225.227.105,54.225.227.45,54.225.227.30,54.225.227.9,54.225.226.117,54.221.255.190,54.221.210.7,54.204.8.61,54.88.208.235,54.83.45.221,52.70.63.25,52.70.61.193,52.70.61.181,52.70.61.174,52.70.60.74,52.70.59.121,52.70.59.59,52.70.58.10,52.70.56.136,52.70.47.45,52.70.35.37,52.70.13.27,52.70.11.137,52.23.140.222,52.23.134.105,52.23.107.89,52.23.87.4,52.23.73.146,52.23.16.199,52.23.13.34,52.22.156.183,52.22.64.192,52.21.134.210,52.21.117.50,52.21.52.149,52.20.141.147,52.20.123.238,52.20.14.163,52.6.197.200,52.6.103.57,52.5.92.125,52.4.246.178,52.4.245.162,52.4.151.41,52.4.98.101,52.3.190.47,52.3.178.163,52.3.149.24,52.2.128.246,52.2.63.194,52.0.55.209,50.16.250.236,50.16.244.193,50.16.242.171,23.23.224.83,23.23.198.191,23.23.197.169,52.11.13.222,35.160.108.105,34.223.219.240,54.188.131.5,54.188.114.190,54.71.197.112,54.200.152.114,52.43.91.219,52.88.16.211,54.200.174.54,54.68.234.245,54.71.115.87} counter accept")
